meta.label: Tax Crisis
meta.description: Mariner Builders — small construction firm. Healthy ops cash, but a massive $42K Q1 federal true-up lands mid-forecast and hollows out the runway.

explanations.explanation: By the week of July 13, your projected balance falls to about $19,550 — about $29,550 below your $10,000 floor. The biggest hits this week are IRS USATAXPYMT EST Q (~$42,000), GUSTO PAYROLL CREW (~$14,800), HISCOX GENERAL LIABILITY (~$610). One concrete lever: carve the federal tax payment into a separate sub-account at the start of each quarter so it isn't competing with operating cash.

By the week of July 20, your projected balance falls to about $850 — about $10,850 below your $10,000 floor. The biggest hits this week are . One concrete lever: review this week's outflows in detail — the biggest items are listed below.
